sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10055" key="a)nti/krisis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίκρῐσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10055.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀπόκρισις</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0406.tlg001:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anaxil.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:113" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.113</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
